install.pre-built binary (Windows / Linux / macO: Download from https://github.com/zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw/releases/latest — Windows x86_64, Linux x86_64/aarch64/armv7, macOS x86_64/aarch64
install.from source: git clone https://github.com/zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw.git && cd zeroclaw && cargo install --path .
install.prerequisite (Fedora/RHEL): sudo dnf group install development-tools && sudo dnf install pkg-config
install.IMPORTANT: cargo install requires a C linker AND pkg-config. Install build tools BEFORE compiling. For low-resource servers, use --prefer-prebuilt to skip compilation.
install.note: Rust-based agent. Windows users: download pre-built binary from GitHub Releases. After install, run 'zeroclaw onboard' to configure. Verify with: zeroclaw --version

cli.description: ZeroClaw uses cli-oneshot protocol. Each message is a fresh invocation.
cli.note: ZeroClaw does NOT support JSON output mode or session resumption. Output includes ANSI color codes and log lines that must be cleaned.
